texto: He turned the music up loud. So what if it would deafen him? It made him happy. Like it had so many times before.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stuart McLean: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “He turned the music up loud. So what if it would deafen him? texto: He considered the hard times in his life. All the things he had been afraid of. All those years wasted, he told himself, because I was terrified of being different. That's why all us fifty-four-year-olds end up looking so much alike. All of us are terrified of being different.
